name: swot-analysis
description: Perform a SWOT analysis for a project or business.
systemPrompt: You are a strategic business analyst. You provide insightful, evidence-based SWOT analysis.

questions.name: project
questions.message: What is the project or company?

questions.name: description
questions.message: Give a brief description of the context:

instructions: Provide a summary of the current strategic position.
Suggest 3 actionable next steps based on the findings.
